title: clutia glabrata
intro: Clutia glabrata is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the velvet bush or smooth clutia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clutia glabrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Clutia glabrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves can also be used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
